entry.title: Re: SAP Build Process Automation - Deploy and Test an API Trigger using Postman
entry.content: hi @patrick_richarts , have you been able to solve this issue? I have exactly the same behaviour

entry.title: Default values that should apply for onboardee and MPH
entry.content:
Hi Onboarding Experts,

I’m looking to default certain fields in the Personal Data Collection screen for onboardees — and I’d like these defaults to also apply in Manage Pending Hires.

For example, I want to set the “Is Primary” flag in Emergency Contacts to “Yes” by default.

However, when I use a standard EC business rule, it only applies in Manage Pending Hire, not in the Data Collection form that the onboardee sees.

Is there a way to make this default apply in both places?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Delivery doesn't pick from Q-Stock as intended for NB...
entry.content: Unfortunately that didn't solve the issue. Is it perhaps not intended by SAP to create deliveries for return purchase orders using Q-stock?

entry.title: Boosting Customer Experience with AI-Driven Insights in SAP C/4HANA
entry.content:
SAP C/4HANA, SAP’s next-generation Customer Experience (CX) suite, enables businesses to engage more meaningfully with customers. When infused with artificial intelligence, the platform transcends conventional CRM by turning data into predictive power. Let’s explore how AI-driven insights within SAP C/4HANA are revolutionizing the customer experience landscape.

1. Predictive Personalization at Scale

AI within SAP C/4HANA can analyze behavioral data from every touchpoint—website visits, social interactions, purchases, and support tickets—to anticipate what a customer wants next. Machine learning algorithms segment customers dynamically and personalize product recommendations, content, and offers at scale.

Example: An e-commerce company using SAP Commerce Cloud can deploy AI models to recommend the right product to the right customer at the right time, increasing conversion rates and customer satisfaction.

2. Smarter Customer Journeys

AI-powered journey orchestration in SAP Marketing Cloud allows businesses to design customer journeys based on real-time behavior and intent. Rather than static campaigns, customers experience dynamic pathways personalized to their preferences and current needs.

Benefit: This dramatically improves open rates, click-through rates, and ultimately, revenue—because each interaction feels tailor-made.

3. Proactive Customer Service

With SAP Service Cloud, AI can proactively detect issues before a customer even reaches out. Sentiment analysis, chatbots, and case routing use NLP (Natural Language Processing) to understand customer queries and resolve them faster.

Result: Reduced wait times, fewer escalations, and enhanced loyalty. AI doesn't just support agents—it empowers them.

4. Sales Intelligence with Next-Best-Actions

In SAP Sales Cloud, AI helps sales teams prioritize leads based on likelihood to convert, customer intent, and deal value. Real-time dashboards suggest “next-best-actions,” enabling reps to close deals more efficiently.

Insight: Sales reps no longer rely on gut feelings. Instead, data-backed decisions drive performance.

5. Voice of the Customer, Amplified

Through Qualtrics XM integrated with SAP C/4HANA, companies can capture feedback across the customer lifecycle and analyze it with AI. The result is a holistic view of customer sentiment, needs, and pain points—delivered in real time.

Why it matters: Businesses can act on insights instantly, not weeks later when the damage is already done.

6. AI-Powered Commerce Optimization

AI in SAP Commerce Cloud helps optimize pricing, promotions, and product placements. It can even simulate outcomes based on different scenarios, allowing businesses to fine-tune campaigns with precision.

Competitive edge: This level of responsiveness means companies stay ahead in fast-changing markets.

Getting Started: AI in SAP C/4HANA Is Within Reach

For businesses already using SAP C/4HANA, the good news is that many of these AI capabilities are native or easily integrable. SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) and embedded AI services like SAP AI Core and SAP AI Launchpad offer a scalable path to deploying and managing intelligent solutions.

Tips for success:

  • Start with high-impact use cases, like churn prediction or personalized recommendations.

  • Ensure your data is clean, structured, and privacy-compliant.

  • Encourage cross-functional collaboration between marketing, sales, IT, and customer service teams.

AI-driven insights in SAP C/4HANA are not just a technology upgrade—they're a paradigm shift. They empower businesses to deliver hyper-personalized, predictive, and consistent customer experiences that foster loyalty and drive growth.

As AI continues to evolve, the synergy between intelligent systems and human creativity will define the next era of customer engagement. With SAP C/4HANA at the center, businesses are well-positioned to lead that transformation.

entry.title: Re: Deficit of BA Stck.in qual.insp 529 KG : Material Pla...
entry.content:
Hi,

my guess is that you have an inbound delivery in EWM that is not (or not fully) processed. If you have not sent a GR message to ERP there cannot be any stock in MMBE. As a result you get an error queue on the ERP side as soon as you trigger the next action that wants to use that stock.

If you double-check in MB51 (ERP) you should see (or rather not see) a movement that "created" the stock you are missing.

Regards Andreas

entry.title: Stay Up to Date with the UI5 Renovate Preset Config
entry.content:
Maintaining the UI5 version is a regular activity for any developer taking care of UI5 applications. In the past, developers had to regularly check the UI5 Demo Kit or were notified by our UI5 Announcements List (which, by the way, I highly recommend subscribing to). That’s a less-than-ideal setup and we’ve heard your request to offer you a more comfortable solution.

We analyzed existing solutions to notify developers whenever a new release of a dependency becomes available. The most prominent options seem to be Dependabot (GitHub) and Renovate (Mend.io). Both create pull requests in your repository to upgrade a dependency to a newly released version. As UI5 offers several options to configure the desired UI5 version, neither tool is capable of handling all of them, requiring an extension for the most prominent cases. Currently (Spring 2025), Dependabot does not offer an extension mechanism. So, we decided to take a deeper look into Renovate and implemented a preset configuration to enable Renovate to update the UI5 version in your projects: The UI5 Renovate Preset Config.

Feature

In our initial version, UI5 Renovate Preset Config can update UI5 versions in UI5 YAML (used by UI5 Tooling) and HTML files used for bootstrapping UI5.

Let’s try it out!

  1. Set up Renovate for your repository by following the onboarding guide.  
  2. Create a new file called "renovate.json" at the root level of your project.
  3. Add the following content to the newly created file.
{
  "$schema": "https://docs.renovatebot.com/renovate-schema.json",
  "extends": [
    "github>ui5/renovate-config"
  ],
  "separateMinorPatch": true
}

Renovate now starts analyzing your project and creates pull requests in your repository to update UI5 versions in case you are not using the latest patch or minor release.

Note: We recommend setting the config property "separateMinorPatch" to true to let Renovate create separate pull requests for minor and patch releases.

The pull request created by Renovate offers many insights about your current version and the new version.

Let's take a closer look at the actual changes Renovate performs on your code. As you can see, the UI5 version is correctly updated to the latest patch version (as of beginning of April 2025).

If your project should only consume Long-Term Support (LTS) releases, use the following content:

{
  "$schema": "https://docs.renovatebot.com/renovate-schema.json",
  "extends": [
    "github>ui5/renovate-config:lts"
  ],
  "separateMinorPatch": true
}

We are looking forward to getting your feedback! We have already collected some additional features on our roadmap; see https://github.com/UI5/renovate-config/issues/14.

entry.title: Managing Qualitative Metrics in SAP Sustainability Control Tower(SCT) for ESRS and BRSR Framework
entry.content:
In this blog, I will be outlining how we can set-up qualitative metrics by their ESG area in SAP Sustainability Control Tower(SCT) from both ESRS (European Sustainability Reporting Standards) and BRSR (Business Responsibility & Sustainability Reporting) framework perspective.

As part of March 2025 release, SAP has released a new feature to create "Qualitative Metrics" by their ESG area. We can assign applicable sustainability matter and define disclosure references based on the applicable reporting standard version. Reference type Narrative, Semi-Narrative, or Boolean can be used to determine the form that the reporting should take.

My Business use case for Qualitative Metric:

From ESRS framework perspective, I have considered the disclosure requirement S1-14:Health and Safety Metrics - The undertaking shall disclose information on the extent to which its own workforce is covered by its health and safety management system and the number of incidents associated with work-related injuries, ill health and fatalities of its own workforce.

From BRSR framework perspective, I have considered Essential Indicator - 4 : Whether the Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) is applicable to the entity`s activities (Yes/No). If yes, whether the waste collection plan is in line with the extended producer responsibility(EPR) plan submitted to Pollution Control Boards? If not, provide steps taken to address the same, from Section-C, Principle-2 : Business should provide goods and services in a manner that is sustainable and safe.

Let us first understand the master data management to establish qualitative metrics from ESRS and BRSR framework perspective.

Master Data Management:

Disclosure Requirement:

Reporting Standard:

Sustainability Matter:

Reporting Standard Version:

Data Point:

Data Point for ESRS S1-14, AR 81

BRSR Section-C,Principle-2, Essential Indicators 2a,2b,3 & 4

Now, let us create Qualitative Metric for ESRS ,S1-14 : Health and Safety Management System for own workforce.

Use "Manage Metrics" application to create a qualitative metric.

Specify the Metric ID, Metric Name, ESG Area, Sustainability Matter, and  Metric Description.

Specify the Disclosure References : Reporting Standard, Disclosure Requirement, and Data Point.

Specify the Assurance parameters.

Specify the Reference Types Definition and save the metric.

Now, let us use "Manage Qualitative ESG Data" application to upload the data for the qualitative metric that we have created, i.e., "Occupational health and safety management system". 

Use " Add Data" option to provide the disclosure information.

Choose the metric id and select the period from the dropdown value and provide the disclosure narrative to report out.

Now, let us create and provide disclosure information for BRSR (Business Responsibility and Sustainability Reporting) Qualitative Metric : Section-C, Principle-2, Essential Indicator - 4 : Whether the Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) is applicable to the entity`s activities (Yes/No). If yes, whether the waste collection plan is in line with the extended producer responsibility(EPR) plan submitted to Pollution Control Boards? If not, provide steps taken to address the same.

Use "Manage Metrics" application to create qualitative metric - Specify the Metric ID, Metric Name, ESG Area, Sustainability Matter, and  Metric Description.

Specify the Disclosure References : Reporting Standard, Disclosure Requirement, and Data Point.

Specify the Assurance parameters.

Specify the Reference Types Definition and save the metric.

Now, let us use "Manage Qualitative ESG Data" application to upload the data for the qualitative metric that we have created, i.e., "Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) is applicable to the entity`s activities (Yes/No)".

Select the Metric Id and period from the dropdown values and provide the disclosure narrative to report out.

The summary of Qualitative Metrics published for a specific period.

😊This brings me to the end of process walkthrough on "Manage Qualitative Metrics" in SAP Sustainability Control Tower (SCT). I hope my blog proves useful to Sustainability Control Tower team. I believe that this qualitative metric management brings a significant value addition to the business, especially when adopting sustainability frameworks, such as ESRS , BRSR etc.

If you want to keep up with the key aspects of SAP Sustainability Control Tower(SCT), SAP EHSM : Environment Management, as well as their seamless integration, check out my SAP Blogs mentioned below.

  1. European Sustainability Reporting Standards (ESRS) 
  2. EHS - Environment Management, Emission Management Part-1 
  3. EHS - Environment Management, Emission Management Part-2 
  4. EHS - Environment Management, Emission Management Part-3 
  5. SAP Sustainability Control Tower-Import Greenhouse Gas Emissions from SAP EHS Environment Management 
  6. Addendum to SAP Sustainability Control Tower-Import Greenhouse Gas Emissions from SAP EHSM-EM 
  7. SAP Sustainability Control Tower(SCT) Metric Management-Basic Custom Metric & Standard Custom Metric 
  8. Exporting and Importing Custom Objects and CPE Packages in SAP Sustainability Control Tower 

 

--

Yours Sincerely,

Pardhasaradhi Reddy.C

entry.title: Re: Triggering the SAP BPA bot when an email arrives via Outlook using VBA: A Comprehensive Guide
entry.content:
Ok I went throug it and make it work. So just in case someone else needs it as well.

In BPA follow these steps:

1) generate service key: https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/create-service-key-for-sap-build-process-automation-instance

2) create API key for your environment: https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/api-keys?q=api+key

3) create API trigger in your environment and copy url

4) pass information from points 1-3 to the code from @ShahIndrajit

entry.title: Re: IFRS 15 - Revenue Recognition
entry.content:
Hi Janina,

Thanks for your reply and the links. We've been doing some reading and also some discussions with the customer, at the moment there is one question remaining. The functionality of Bundling/Multi-element-arrangement, is this something that needs to be activated from start or can it be added later on aswell? At the moment the customer doesn't seems to have the need but they plan to expand so it might be needed in the futur. 

Kind Regards, Sanne

entry.title: 1H 2025 New and Upgraded Transactional Use Cases in Joule in Talent space
entry.content:
New Transactional Use Cases in Joule

Performance & Goals:
1.Create Activity – Allows users to create activities for themselves and for others that they share a channel with. Users can also link the activities to relevant performance and development goals.
2.View Performance Goals – Access and view detailed performance goals, including name, plan, and status. Navigate to the goal details for more insights.
3.Edit Performance Goals – Edit performance goals by adjusting status and completion percentage. Currently only these two fields are supported.
4.Add Comments to Performance Goals – Facilitate collaboration and feedback by adding comments to performance goals.

Succession & Development:
1.View Development Goals – View development goals, including the goal name, goal plan name, and goal status, and follow a link to the goal details page for more information.
2.Edit Development Goals – Allows users to edit the status and completion percentage of development goals. Currently only these two fields are supported.
3.Add Comments to Development Goals – Allows users to add comments to development goals.

Upgraded Existing Transactional Use Cases in Joule


Opportunity Marketplace:
1.Approve assignment offers
2.Approve assignment acceptance
3.Approve assignment applications
4.Approve assignment publishing

Performance & Goals:
1.Give feedback
2.Request feedback
3.Edit performance goals

Succession & Development:
1.View talent pool nominee approvals
2.Approve mentors
3.Approve mentoring requests
4.View and edit development goals
5.Add comments to development goals

For a detailed release summary, check out the “What’s New Viewer” for a list of enhancements across the application.

Thanks

Mridul

entry.title: Re: Can I deliver a custom theme to all subscribers of my multitenant SaaS solution?
entry.content:
We integrated it in mta.yaml with the build workzone standard

service: type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service 
parameters: service: build-workzone-standard 
service-plan: standard

The documentation is outdated i think. Because it refers to:

service: portal 
service-plan: standard

entry.title: Authorization problem BW Composite provider
entry.content:
Hello, 
I have an issue with a new authorization role I created in a SAP BW/4HANA system. 

The test user is able to view aDSOs and create Queries on Composites, but she is not able to view the Composite in Eclipse. With my user, in the same eclipse installation I see everything alright (I created two projects within my installation for the two users to ensure that it's not the eclipse version's fault). 

My view:

User's view (empty folder):

The authorization is set similar to the aDSO authorization which works fine (the Composite one is even less restrictive):

aDSO restriction:

Does anyone have any hint for me in how to fix this interesting problem? 

Thank you very much! 

Br, Nina

entry.title: Re: BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE
entry.content:
Hello @dchandra 

That is how BAPIs are typically developed. They give transaction control to the client, so the client (the caller of a BAPI) can decide to commit changes or roll them back. See SAP Help Transaction Model for Developing BAPIs

Thus, you need to call BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT after BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE to persist the material document. Also notice that you can't call BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE more then once without either BAPI_TRANSATION_COMMIT or BAPI_TRANSACTION_ROLLBACK between the calls. That is one of the peculiarities of  BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Hi Guys, Can help me on this
entry.content: Cancel

entry.title: Re: Can I perform SD integration for utility products without using AVC?
entry.content:
Hi @TillHeinen,

If I remember correctly, as long as you don't set a value for IS-U Product Attributes of the item during sales order creation, AVC won't be used. You can see the IS-U Product Attributes of the utilities product in the view I_UtilsProdAttributes. For example, in our case, if we set ISU_UIL_BASE_FEE when creating a sales order, then AVC is used.

If you'd like to see the logic for yourself, you can search for the method SET_PRODUCT_AVC_VALUE in the class CL_CRMS4_IU_CM_PFP_SD_I_ORDER

entry.title: Re: Backflush consumption material component at final confirmation CNF?
entry.content: Hi Pavan, I assigned the process control to order type. Still it disallows the direct issue via MIGO to backflush material. In the Process Control SAP1 for order cat 30, I failed the 3 options under Backflush.

entry.title: Re: How to automate the determination of partner bank account when creating invoices?
entry.content: Can you explain you're requirement in detail. For eg. do you want to update the partner bank type while posting the invoice or update it while making the payment

entry.title: Re: How to change field position in output display of tra...
entry.content:
Thank you for the helpful response!

But I managed to change the field position in the field catalogue in Z_TAX_FLD_BADI_014 using the following code: INSERT ls_fieldcat INTO ch_tab_fieldcat INDEX 10.

Instead of using an append statement.

entry.title: Re: crystal report issue
entry.content: Hello DonWilliams, We are using 2022 CR version. MS SQL Server 2022 standard 64 bit, version is 16.0.4165.4

entry.title: Re: How to create a RAP BO to change the content of a customizing table in the production client
entry.content:
Hi @patrick_winkler,
Thanks for pointing the adaptableInProduction field cearly.
When the transport object definition was modified by setting the field adaptableInProduction as true and saving the object it gives an error as transportRecording should be maintained as notSupported instead of automatic.

How this will effect saving the entries in the table in the different systems.

Regards,
Shyam Prasad.

entry.title: Re: SAP Ariba Integration Approach
entry.content: great information

entry.title: Re: Using the Migration Project in Different Client
entry.content:
For the error "Project not found; Use F4 help to select a Project" when trying to use the Migration Project in the different client.

  1. Implement SAP Note 3452059 - Incorrect Migration Approach for Project in Different Client, SAP S/4HANA Migration Object Modeler in your system.
  2. After implementation, open the migration project in target client and use the option from menu bar (Goto -> Use Project in Different Client).

Also for your reference, kindly refer to the KBA 3501633 

Thanks and Regards,
Moumita.

Internal users should receive mails along with PO attachment.

Please provide me the solution.

Veera Vani Muddala.

entry.title: Business Application Studio - Adding test cases learning unit - test.js
entry.content:
Hello,

I am learning ABAP coding.
The current unit is Building side-by-side extensions on SAP BTP/Adding Test Cases
https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/build-side-by-side-extensions-on-sap-btp/adding-test-cases
When I test the application there are errors. I tried to install components, went back to see if I had missed something.

I found the test.js code might be the issue.
The test.js code can be found in two places.
1 - https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/add-test-cases.html
When I copy the first, there are 3 errors.
2 - https://github.com/SAP-samples/teched2023-XP260/tree/main/exercises/Add%20Test%20Cases
When I copy the second, there are 2 errors.
Errors are attached.

I tried to figure out what might be the issue but I haven't found it yet.
Any idea?

Thanks
Laszlo

@nellsenp @SANAU1

entry.title: Re: IBP fill key figure with values from future bucket
entry.content:
Hi @DaRos ,

 

How many empty buckets (periods) are you expecting to have? If the dimension is not very high (let's say you have 5 periods of blank values before stored values), I would suggest creating a series of helper key figures that perform negative period shifts. This manual workaround can help fill the empty buckets with the last known value from future periods:

  1.  

Helper 1 KF :  IBP_PERIODSHIFT("YOURSTOREDKF@YOURBASEPLANNINGLEVEL", -1)

Helper 2 KF: IBP_PERIODSHIFT("YOURSTOREDKF@YOURBASEPLANNINGLEVEL", -2)

Helper 3 KF: IBP_PERIODSHIFT("YOURSTOREDKF@YOURBASEPLANNINGLEVEL", -3)

Helper 4 KF: IBP_PERIODSHIFT("YOURSTOREDKF@YOURBASEPLANNINGLEVEL", -4)

Helper 5 KF: IBP_PERIODSHIFT("YOURSTOREDKF@YOURBASEPLANNINGLEVEL", -5)

2.

Then I would create a calculated KF to show the final value (either the stored CI DS one (if exists) -> if it doesn't exist : display value of periodshift -1 (if it's different than null)  -> if it doesn't exist : display periodshift-2  (if it is different than null) -> etc till period shift -5 helper KF

FINALKF would look like this : 

= IF(NOT(ISNULL(YOURSTOREDKF@YOURBASEPLANNINGLEVEL), YOURSTOREDKF@YOURBASEPLANNINGLEVEL,  IF(NOT(ISNULL(Helper 2 KF@YOURBASEPLANNINGLEVEL), Helper 2 KF@YOURBASEPLANNINGLEVEL,  IF(NOT(ISNULL(Helper 3 KF@YOURBASEPLANNINGLEVEL),  Helper 3 KF@YOURBASEPLANNINGLEVEL  , etc until Helper 5 )

Alternatively, you can raise a Customer Influence request to SAP and suggest they implement an IBP_FIRST_VALUE calculation here: 

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/21/ideas

entry.title: Re: CU50 in internal tables
entry.content:
thanks Sandra_Rossi for you feedback.

I create SHDB with option and it's OK, I go until the end of the transaction :
report Z_SHDB_CU50
       no standard page heading line-size 255.

include bdcrecx1.

start-of-selection.

perform open_group.

perform bdc_dynpro      using 'SAPLCUKO' '0030'.
perform bdc_field       using 'BDC_CURSOR'
                              'RCUKO-MENGE'.
perform bdc_field       using 'BDC_OKCODE'
                              '=GOON'.
perform bdc_field       using 'RCUKO-MATNR'
                              'MATERIAL'.
perform bdc_field       using 'RCUKO-MENGE'
                              '1'.
perform bdc_field       using 'RCUKO-DATUV'
                              '09.04.2025'.
perform bdc_field       using 'RCUKO-PROCESS_SALES'
                              'X'.
perform bdc_field       using 'RCUKO-RSBOM'
                              'X'.
perform bdc_dynpro      using 'SAPLCEI0' '1000'.
perform bdc_field       using 'BDC_OKCODE'
                              '/00'.
perform bdc_field       using 'BDC_CURSOR'
                              'RCTMS-MWERT(01)'.
perform bdc_field       using 'RCTMS-MWERT(01)'
                              'CHAR_VALUE'.
perform bdc_dynpro      using 'SAPLCEI0' '1000'.
perform bdc_field       using 'BDC_OKCODE'
                              '=CALC'.
perform bdc_field       using 'BDC_CURSOR'
                              'RCTMS-MWERT(01)'.
perform bdc_dynpro      using 'SAPLCKDI' '4610'.
perform bdc_field       using 'BDC_OKCODE'
                              '/00'.
perform bdc_field       using 'BDC_CURSOR'
                              'CKI64A-KLVAR'.
perform bdc_field       using 'CKI64A-KLVAR'
                              'CVS'.
perform bdc_field       using 'CKI64A-LOSGR'
                              '            1.000'.
perform bdc_transaction using 'CU50'.

perform close_group.



=> Now, how can I retrieve my internal tables data ?
thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: 'Generate Mappings' or AI-functionality for emission factor mapping still not working in SAP SFM
entry.content:
Hi Edgar,

thanks for raising this. Can you please open a support ticket so our developers can look into this specific case in detail? It's unfortunately not possible to figure out the root cause based on your screenshot only.

In general, die AI-mapping functionality works as expected.

Best, Nico

Could you please comment? Thanks!

entry.title: Replacement of Core Tool functionalities by functionalities in Cockpit Fiori apps as of SAP CC 2025
entry.content:
IMPORTANT NOTICE

Dear SAP BRIM Community, as of the next major release of SAP Convergent Charging, which will be released in Q4 2025, some Core Tool functionalities will be gradually replaced by functionalities available in Cockpit Fiori apps.

The functionalities provided in Fiori apps will cover 100% of the documented scope for the Core Tool. The replacement strategy consists in replacing functionalities, user role by user role. For each user role, a dedicated SAP Note will be published detailing the corresponding functionalities available in the Cockpit.

As an example, the first user role being considered is the User Administrator role, for which the functionalities will not be available in the Core Tool any longer. The User Administrator role will then use the dedicated Fiori apps available in the Cockpit:

  • Manage User Accounts
  • Manage Permissions

 There are multiple reasons why we are making this critical step:

Better User Experience

With Fiori apps available in the Cockpit, we intend to enhance the user experience that is aligned with SAP’s strategy and provides consistency across SAP products, and in SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management in particular.

AI-assisted Functionalities

AI-assisted functionalities, which will be added over time to SAP Convergent Charging in private cloud, will only be available through the Cockpit and its Fiori apps and won’t be available in the Core Tool.

For detailed information on the planned innovations, please visit SAP Road Map Explorer at roadmaps.sap.com.

Easier Deployment

At the end of the day, users won’t have to install Core Tool on their desktop/laptop but will only use their Web browser to interact with SAP Convergent Charging.

If you have any feedback, please leave a note on this blog page.

entry.title: Re: How to disable substitutions for My Inbox in S/4HANA...
entry.content:
To disable the substitution feature, when configuring the My Inbox tile, set the 'substitution' parameter to false.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a630d57fc5004c6383e7a81efee7a8bb/865dddc8717e408f91209697497e4a55.html?q=manage+my+substitutions

entry.title: Re: How to automate the determination of partner bank account when creating invoices?
entry.content: Hi Vedant,

entry.title: Re: Change the inspection stock of material XXXXXXX in QM only
entry.content: @recep_tetik I'd strongly suggest not to do that. The message QA495 is there for a reason. If you bypass it under debugger, you'll introduce stock inconsistencies between MM and QM.

entry.title: Joule Multi Language Support
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm impressed by the capabilities of SAP Joule — it's truly a powerful and promising technology.
I would like to ask whether there is a specific timeline or roadmap for supporting the Turkish language.
Is this planned for an upcoming release?
Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Change the inspection stock of material XXXXXXX in QM...
entry.content:
Hello @Shimpei2 

The message QA495 is described in the note 86638 - Error: QA495 during Inventory management Posting. Briefly, it's purpose is to keep QM and MM stock data consistent.

As your custom movement types are copies of physical inventory postings, see the note 83954 - Physical inventory of inspection stock about possible solution. You need to reflect in QM inspection lots stock level changes posted in MIGO.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: RF Framework split Warehouse Task
entry.content:
When processing a warehouse task via the RF framework, the system automatically divides the task into 2 individual tasks:
1. Outbound booking
2. Inbound booking

For this reason, we have to double-confirm each task during production deployment via the RF Framework.
We use eEWM in conjunction with the SAP Public Cloud.

Unfortunately, the whole thing creates an increased additional effort in the provision of materials.

I hope someone here can help me with this problem.
Thank you very much

entry.title: Re: Migrating to Crystal 64-bit questions
entry.content: I was able to blag what I needed from CRDATES.* and put those in the main source file. BTW, in the sample project, there is a /SAFESH in additional parameters, that need sto be changed to /SAFESH:NO for x64

entry.title: Re: How to automate the determination of partner bank account when creating invoices?
entry.content: Hi Vedant, During a business transaction, payments can be made into different bank accounts owned by the supplier, depending on the company code. However, inappropriate payee bank account determination can happen. To avoid this case, Partner Bank Type is provided to identify a bank account and its company code. Previously during the invoice creation process, the partner bank type information must be manually entered into the document via the field “Partner Bank Type”. How to save the repetitive manual effort for accounts payable accountants in this step? Substituting “Partner Bank Type” with other fields (e.g. Supplier ID) can solve this problem.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Olá, sou Márcio Souza, 45 anos de idade, resido em Guarulhos/SP, estudando programação e DataBase, afim de migrar, não conhecia SAP até conversar com uma analista que me falou, fui ver oque era e acabei me interessando , não conhecia essa tecnologia.

entry.title: Re: HANA Workload Management deep dive part III
entry.content:
Hi Jens,

Thank you for the excellent article and the comprehensive explanation.
We are using multiple workload classes with varying characteristics. Admission control is currently not enabled in our system, as CPU limits are never reached – largely due to the effective workload management we have implemented.

I do have a question, though:
Is there a way to monitor whether specific users are consistently hitting e.g. the thread limit, and whether their requests are being queued or even rejected as a result?

I’m aware of the HANA view M_WORKLOAD_CLASS_STATISTICS, but I’m unsure whether it provides the level of detail we require for this specific purpose.

Thanks.

BR, Reinhard

entry.title: Re: Designing UI5 Apps for SAP Launchpad Service – Part 2
entry.content:
Hi @devbot 

regarding 1.I try to clarify the terminology a bit.
I assume with "library app" you mean the HTML5 Application which contains the UI5 bundle of type library (declared in the manifest). 
Any UI5 package can define different types in its manifest.

  • An "application" is something which you can start and run as an app.
  • A component is a reusable part which you can embed into an application. It is almost an app, but would not be started directly.
  • A library contains controls and reuse code and is not runnable independently as an app.

However it is possibly to embed them within others in a subfolder. E.g. in an HTML5 Application you can have

  • an application in the root folder and components in subfolders.
  • a library in the root folder which embeds components in a sub folder.
  • However embedded applications in a library is not a usual pattern (although it is possible).

HTML Repository does not care about these types. It only knows HTML5 Applications which are defined by the manifests in the root folder. The name of the HTML5 App is derived from the sap.app/id. It does not know about the embedded manifest files in sub folder. It will list all known HTML5 applications in the cockpit and provide you a link to the app regardless of the type. 
Any HTML5 app can provide html pages to run standalone and define an entry page which is opened by default. All further routing to backend services can be configured in xs-app.json and works as long as you properly use relative paths as explained in the blog.

I.e. you can add an index.html to the HTML5 App which contains the library in the root and open it. It just does not make sense, because a library is not intended to be started as an application. You would have to put an app inside and start this. 

Regarding 2. it depends how you connect app1 to the library (or whatever it is). If it is an app 2 app navigation in the launchpad, you would pass parameters in the navigation intend (however you can't navigate to a library because a library can't run on its own. Outside of the launchpad you would have to implement your own app2app navigation.
If it is a component which you embed, there are different ways to have a communication which I can't describe fully. Possibilities are start-up parameters, providing component interfaces, using event bus, using the propagated models of the main app,...
If it is a library, the app would call its reusable methods or controls and set the control properties as needed.

Best regards
Matthias

entry.title: Re: Can I deliver a custom theme to all subscribers of my multitenant SaaS solution?
entry.content: The service build-workzone-standard is from product SAP Build Work Zone. It is not Cloud Portal Service. I thought It does not support launchpad module, any support is not documented.

entry.title: Re: SAP GROW embeded TM - multi pick and multi drop scena...
entry.content:
Dear Saurabh,

Good day, after exploring and also getting help from SAP principal presales teams,
unfortunately, the use case is not supported yet.

The multidrop is supported, but in the case of multidrop with multi carrier involve is not yet supported.

thank you for the feedback.

Best regards, Freddy

entry.title: In AMDP, is it possible to use a SEQUENCE object? (nextval)
entry.content:
I'd like to do a SELECT query in an AMDP method with one column being a number starting at 1, incremented by 1, without gaps.

As ROW_NUMBER is not guaranteed to avoid gaps, I guess I should use a SEQUENCE HANA object that I reset to 1 before running the query. For using a sequence, I need to use HANA SQL, so either I use native SQL, or I use a CDS table function and AMDP.

With native SQL, it works:

REPORT.
DATA dummy_column TYPE c LENGTH 1.
DATA autoincrement TYPE i.
DATA error TYPE REF TO cx_root.

TRY.
    EXEC SQL.
      drop sequence zmysequence;
    ENDEXEC.
  CATCH cx_sy_native_sql_error INTO error ##NO_HANDLER ##NEEDED.
ENDTRY.

TRY.
    EXEC SQL.
      create sequence zmysequence start with 1 increment by 1;
    ENDEXEC.
  CATCH cx_sy_native_sql_error INTO error ##NO_HANDLER ##NEEDED.
ENDTRY.

TRY.
    EXEC SQL PERFORMING test.
      select dummy_column, 
             zmysequence.nextval autoincrement
          from ( select 'A' dummy_column from dummy
                 union select 'B' dummy_column from dummy )
          into :dummy_column, :autoincrement
    ENDEXEC.
  CATCH cx_sy_native_sql_error INTO error ##NO_HANDLER ##NEEDED.
ENDTRY.

ASSERT 1 = 1. " dummy statement for setting a breakpoint (if debug needed)

FORM test.
  WRITE : / dummy_column, autoincrement.
ENDFORM.

If now I try with AMDP, it doesn't allow sequences:

Error without USING:

"ZMYSEQUENCE" is unknown. ABAP objects and DDIC objects must be declared in the USING clause of the method. Local names must start with ":" here.

Error with USING:

"ZMYSEQUENCE" is invalid. Only transparent database tables, views, or AMDP methods can be specified after USING.

Is there a way to define an autoincrement with AMDP?

entry.title: Re: How to configure a scheduled data import with DTW (Data Transfer Workbench)
entry.content:
Thanks for the guide. 

It seems that the procedure no longer works.

We have Windows scheduled tasks that run DTWs at night. After the update these automatic DTWs do not work anymore because recent SAP versions require an external authentication framework.

There is a solution?

entry.title: How to check if Group reporting have been activated or not in S/4 HANA system
entry.content:
Backgroud:
As you might know, the solution of "SAP Group reporting"(FIN-CS) was developed based on EC-CS, there are a lot of shared tables and programs.
In other words,  Parallel Usage of EC-CS and SAP S/4HANA for Group Reporting is a big challenge. You can either use EC-CS or FIN-CS.
Only in some specific situation, you can have both be used in the system, for more details, please check below SAP Note:
2833748 - SAP S/4HANA OP ( "on premise" ) - Transition from EC-CS to SAP S/4HANA for Group Reporting

In order to use "SAP Group reporting"(FIN-CS)，You must activated the Group reporting by activating the Best Practice scope item XX_1SG_OP or running Initialize Settings in an EC-CS client, which contains EC-CS configuration without any transaction data in database table ECMCT. And after that, EC-CS becomes unusable! 

For the Group Reporting function activation, you may refer to FAQ SAP Note 2659672 - FAQ About SAP S/4HANA Finance for Group Reporting (On Premise)
Please check chapter 1.1 and 1.21 for this FAQ SAP note. It refers to the Admin Guide how to proceed with Best Practice activation in general.
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/4cef93946a0b48ec89533b3c34443b85/17d958a88d244ee293aed687f9bfe37f.html?locale=en-US
It also contains a document:
How To Install Best Practices Content 1SG_1809_V1.pdf and How To Install Best Practices Content 1SG_V4.pdf(this is valid for S/4 HANA 1909 and later release)

Check if Group reporting activated or not:
1) go to SE16N, check the field below in table TF001,
Starting Year for LIs in SAP S/4HANA    -->  it means group report have been activated
From Year for New Group Reporting Logic  -> it means new group reporting have been activated
From Year f. Group Report. Prep. Ledger -> it means GRPL have been used from this year
2) check in table TF007 - SAP Consolidation: System Status in S/4HANA 
there should be one entry with "System Status of S/4 HANA Consolidation" = X

Others:
For more information about above fields, please check the F1 help of it like below:
------------------------------
Starting Year for LIs in SAP S/4HANA 

Definition

Business year from which the system maintains the line items in Consolidation in SAP S/4 HANA structures.

Use

Before the start of the effective from fiscal year, the system behaves like EC-CS; at the start of the effective from fiscal year, the system behaves like SAP S/4HANA Finance for group reporting.

At the beginning of the effective from fiscal year, the system only stores the transactional data as line items, this means there is no aggregation of documents to the summary data.

The line items in the SAP S/4 HANA structures enable the processing and evaluation of consolidation at a high level of detail.

Dependencies

The transactional data before the effective from fiscal year remains unchanged in the consolidation structures, this means that there is no conversion of the legacy data to the SAP S/4 HANA structures.

During the execution of the balance carryforward in the effective from fiscal year, the system reads the summary data of the previous year from the structures in consolidation and carries forward this data as line Items to the structures in S/4 HANA to the period zero of the effective year.

Not specifying the effective from fiscal year is equivalent to 9999, that is, in this case the system continues to use the summary data and line items in consolidation, but not the detailed line items in consolidation in SAP S/4 HANA.

After you have specified the effective from fiscal year, you can no longer change it.
------------------------------

From Year for New Group Reporting Logic

Short Text

From Year for New Group Reporting Logic in SAP S/4HANA

Definition

From year for new logic for group reports in SAP S/4HANA

Use

If the from year is not initial, the new logic for group reports in SAP S/4HANA is active in the from year and in later fiscal years. This has consequences if the fiscal year that you set in global settings is not earlier than the from year:

  • In SAP S/4HANA, there are no hierarchies for consolidation groups with the new group reporting logic; instead, such consolidation groups contain a flat list of consolidation units. You maintain the structure of consolidation groups in group reporting in SAP S/4HANA in the application Manage Group Structure.
  • The report logic rates the assignment of the consolidation units (and also the assignment of partner units when eliminating pairs) for the current consolidation group for which you execute the report to decide whether a data record is displayed in the report. However, the reporting logic does not evaluate the attributes of the consolidation units (consolidation intervals, inclusion types) that depend on the consolidation group. The reports thereby also show data records before the first consolidation or after the divestiture accounting, as well as data records for consolidation units, which are consolidated using the equity method.
  • The tasks of the type Consolidation Group Change post additional documents for the periodic cancellation of data records before the first consolidation or after divestiture accounting, as well as of data records in consolidation units using the equity method.

Dependencies

The from year for the new group logic must not be earlier than the from year for line items in SAP S/4HANA.

The from year for the new group logic is not ready for input because this setting is made exclusively by SAP Support. To reconcile these activities, you must open a customer message on SAP Service Marketplace on the FIN-CS-COR component.
------------------------------
From Year f. Group Report. Prep. Ledger

Short Text

From Year for Group Reporting Preparation Ledger

Definition

From year for the integration of Financial Accounting and Group Reporting via preparation ledger

Use

If you specify a non-initial fiscal year for the from year for group reporting preparation ledger, you can use the enhanced functionality for the integration of Financial Accounting and Group Reporting in this from year and in following years. To do this, you must maintain additional settings:

  • In process step Define Preparation Ledger, specify the Financial Accounting ledger to which the system is to post information relevant for consolidation (Group Reporting) to Financial Accounting. You must assign a Group Reporting consolidated chart of accounts to each of these Financial Accounting preparation ledgers. Additionally, you can specify special versions for line item assignment and line item attributes (optional).
  • In process step Define Versions, you assign the Group reporting preparation ledger and the source for group currency key figure to a consolidation version in which you want to use the enhanced functionality for integration. Assignment of the source for group currency key figure to the master data of the consolidation units is therefore obsolete.

Dependencies

You can only set the from year for group reporting preparation ledger if the both the following from years are non-initial:

  • From year for line items in SAP S/4HANA
  • From year for the new group reporting logic in SAP S/4HANA

The from year for group reporting preparation ledger must not be earlier than the from year for the new group reporting logic in SAP S/4HANA.
------------------------------

entry.title: Accessing Product Description in Value Help Using sap/api_product/srvd_a2x/sap/product/0002 API
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I'm working on an SAP CAP (Cloud Application Programming) project where I need to access product descriptions in a value help for a product using the OData API https://{host}:{port}/sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_product/srvd_a2x/sap/product/0002. However, I'm encountering an issue when implementing the search help for the product description, and I need some guidance.

To access the external API I've defined an index.cds file under /srv/external. In this file I have included the following entity projects:

namespace external;

@readonly
entity Product                               as
    projection on PRODUCT_0002.Product {
        key Product,
            BaseUnit,
            _ProductDescription  : redirected to ProductDescription,
    }

@readonly
entity ProductDescription                         as
    projection on PRODUCT_0002.ProductDescription {
        key Product,
        key Language,
            ProductDescription,
    }

In my service definition I've included the project following entities:

using {external as externalServices} from './external';

    entity Product                as projection on externalServices.Product;
    entity ProductDescription     as projection on externalServices.ProductDescription;

In the annotation for the fiori application I have included:

annotate service.x with {
    product @(
        Common.Label : '{i18n>product}',
        Common.ValueList : {
            $Type : 'Common.ValueListType',
            CollectionPath : 'ProductDescription',
            Parameters : [
                {
                    $Type : 'Common.ValueListParameterInOut',
                    LocalDataProperty : product_Product,
                    ValueListProperty : 'Product',
                },
            ],
        },
        Common.ValueListWithFixedValues : false,
    )
};

In the console I get the following error:

    message: 'Error during request to remote service: Unspecified provider error occurred. See Error Context and Call Stack.',
    code: 'ERR_BAD_REQUEST',
    config: {
      timeout: 0,
      xsrfCookieName: 'XSRF-TOKEN',
      xsrfHeaderName: 'X-XSRF-TOKEN',
      maxContentLength: -1,
      maxBodyLength: -1,
      method: 'get',
      baseURL: 'https://sandbox.api.sap.com/s4hanacloud/sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_product/srvd_a2x/sap/product/0002',
      proxy: false,
      url: "/Product(Product='undefined')?$expand=_ProductDescription($filter=Language%20eq%20'undefined')",
      data: undefined
    },

What am I missing here?

Thank you in advance for your time!

Nicolaas

entry.title: Re: Issue with GA SAP S/4HANA - Users Not Visible
entry.content: Vielen Dank für eure Unterstützung! SAP hat auf mein Ticket geantwortet und die Empfehlung gegeben, die SNote 3582921 herunterzuladen und im System einzuspielen. Das Einspielen war erfolgreich. Die SNote soll die Diskrepanz im System beheben. Jetzt warte ich auf die nächste Vermessung durch SAP

entry.title: Re: Issue with GA SAP S/4HANA - Users Not Visible
entry.content: Vielen Dank für eure Unterstützung! SAP hat auf mein Ticket geantwortet und die Empfehlung gegeben, die SNote 3582921 herunterzuladen und im System einzuspielen. Das Einspielen war erfolgreich. Die SNote soll die Diskrepanz im System beheben. Jetzt warte ich auf die nächste Vermessung durch SAP

entry.title: Can Output Management be used for custom forms?
entry.content:
I'm able to put a completely custom form generated PDF into a Print Queue on S/4HANA Public Edition. That's a great start, but it does not enable users to reprint anything.

Output Management does contain that functionality, but as far as I can see that's only available for standard SAP form types. Nor is there an API or Business Object with which I can interact with Output Management. If I interpret the app correctly, Output Management is the step before actual output. From there, a document can be mailed, transferred to a different system or printed. In the latter case, it would then end up in the corresponding Print Queue.

An alternative would be to create a custom Fiori app for it, but we would of course prefer to stick to as much standard apps and functionality as possible.

entry.title: Reminder Email Notification of Purchase Requisition Approval可否設置重複一直提醒
entry.content:
客戶提出Reminder Email Notification of Purchase Requisition Approval可否設置重複提醒，如果Approver沒有approve。

例如: 設置deadline一天, 當Approver超過1+1天未approve, approver收到兩個Reminder Email.

我找到了一個SAP Notes講standard system design未能做到。但請問可以有其他功能可以設置或者寫程序去設置

3233661 - Purchase Requisition Reminder Emails Are Triggered Only Once
https://pages.community.sap.com/zh/topics/s4hana-cloud

謝謝!

entry.title: Re: Converting Excel File to XML format in SAP CPI using JAR files and groovy script
entry.content: Good one. The jars are not available to download from the location mentioned.

entry.title: Can the Requested Quantity key figure only shows number?
entry.content:
Currently in the sales order volume report, the key figure Requested Quantity will show the quantity together with UoM. Is there a way to only show the quantity value?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Can the Requested Quantity key figure only shows number?
entry.content:
For the key figure requested quantity, it is a combination field to show the quantity together with the UoM. It is not able to only show the number value.

It is the designed behavior.

Alejandro

entry.title: Improve Q&A to show "SAP managed tags" and "labels" all together?
entry.content:
When I look at a question, the SAP Managed Tags are not sufficient to understand the scope of the question, they are too much general. The labels bring more value but are displayed at the end of the question. Is it possible to put them up, right below the SAP Managed Tags?

e.g. In AMDP, is it possible to use a SEQUENCE object? ... - SAP Community

this is the current way to show the question

I'd like to see "SAP managed tags" and "labels" all together:

Thank you.

Sandra

entry.title: Quarterly Release Highlights: SAP BTP Security and Identity & Access Management
entry.content:
In the first quarter of 2025, we released several new features and enhancements for SAP Cloud Identity Services. Let’s take a closer look!

SAP Cloud Identity Services allows tenant administrators to create and edit application-specific groups via the administration console. While this feature was released at the end of 2024, we added token attribute configuration capabilities in 2025. You can now specify how the local user attributes, configured to be collected by the registration and upgrade forms, are sent to the application. Read Configuring User Attributes from the Identity Directory for detailed information.

You can now enable identity federation for an application to override the identity federation settings on the configured corporate identity provider for the application. For more information, check Configure Identity Federation for Applications.

We added automatic renewal of expired SAML signing certificates. Identity Authentication can automatically update the expired encryption certificate as well as the SAML 2.0 certificate during the first sign-in attempt that fails due to the expired certificate. You can find details in our SAP Help Portal documentation: Configure SAML 2.0 Service Provider.

We extended the Identity Directory service to trigger immediate provisioning of application-specific groups. This enables companies to adopt our reference architecture for cloud-leading identity lifecycles and accelerate adoption of SAP cloud solutions. It also reduces efforts for point-to-point connections. The SAP Help Portal offers additional information.

You can now download and view the details of all entities updated by a provisioning job. For more information, see Manage Provisioning Job Logs and List of Properties.

Want to stay up to date on our services? Join our SAP BTP Security and SAP Cloud Identity Services communities!

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Group Reporting - New Balance Validation Process
entry.content: Are AMDP still used in the new validation engine? able to debug?

entry.title: Can I have a scroll bar for sap.m.tree in Mobile devices?
entry.content:
I tried to enclose the tree in a scroll container

<ScrollContainer vertical="true" width="auto" height="{parts: [{path: 'device>/resize/height'}], formatter: '.editHeightOfVSB'}">

The height will be around 80% percent of the container. With this code, I could see two scroll bars while running app in BAS. But in the mobile, I don't see the scroll bars.

The scrolling works but I need to show the bars to let the user know where he is at. 
Thanks for the help in advance.

entry.title: Re: Can I deliver a custom theme to all subscribers of my multitenant SaaS solution?
entry.content:
@Dinuyou are right, i can't find a documentation either. But i can confirm that it works. I used this repository as a template (mtxs-bookshop-workzone is the service):
https://github.com/gregorwolf/mtxs-bookshop/blob/5595980779816a97143f31791f5b402e4aa4e677/mta.yaml#L385-L389

entry.title: Re: Attach Rate Planning in IBP
entry.content: Thanks for the detailed info.

entry.title: Re: How to create a RAP BO to change the content of a customizing table in the production client
entry.content:
Hi @ShyamPrasad,
"notSupported" means you don't need to record configuration changes on a transport request and the maintenance application does not offer any functionality for recording the changes. 

I recommend using the ADT wizard to create such an app with the "No Transport" option.

entry.title: Re: Deficit of BA Stck.in qual.insp 529 KG : Material Pla...

entry.title: Re: Smooth Transition Ahead: SAP Enable Now Migration from SAP BTP Neo to SAP BTP, Kyma runtime
entry.content:
Hello Kristina,

We are receiving some concerning mails from a few customers regarding this migration, not really knowing what to do. They are coming back to us with lots of questions asking us as SAP partner to help and take responsibility.  What is needed form our part, how can we support them? Is there some kind of newsletter available to send to them? Are all SEN customers impacted? Thx for your support in how to deal with our customers as partner.

entry.title: Re: Matrix Grid Report shown as unrated
entry.content: Hi @lushcacomley, you can check out this KBA: https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2848627 In my case the issue occurs because of the Calibration data source in-progress pm form/completed pm form. Best regards, Sandra

entry.title: Re: How to input different GI date in 1 delivery note number
entry.content:
Hello,

goods issue date is a header parameter in the outbound delivery, so it cannot be different for each item. If you want to have different GI dates per items, you need to create separate deliveries (you can update the dates in a sales order or directly in the delivery). 

Best regards

entry.title: Re: How to dynamically set the basic authentication for t...
entry.content: Hello Lorena, thanks for your answer. Yes, this is the approach with setting fixed values in the policy. But I try to set some values dynamically on runtime with variables.

entry.title: Re: Side-by-side POD Plugins using Layout Containers within SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Hi Manoel,

Could you please tell me how I can add a vertical toolbar to my pod?

Currently all my buttons are on a Horizontal toolbar, but I would like to move them to a Vertical one. Unfortunately I always get the error below when I try to drag and drop the Vertical Toolbar in the pod designer, no matter where I drop it. Also, I don't see how I could add an additional Split Pane, as I don't have it in Controls tab

This is the current layout of my POD

Thank you!

entry.title: Mass Fixed Asset Retirement OData Version issue
entry.content:
When attempting to post a mass asset retirement via the API ( https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/5bcca49998834de2b5533c36602e52a2/2b3aafb1a2df4e6fa8610fe55a375449.html?locale=en-US ), we notice that an individual accounting document is being created for each asset, rather than a single consolidated document for all assets. I've attached the payload we are using for your reference.

Is there anything we are missing?

Currently, we are using OData V2 models for all other APIs. However, this particular API appears to require an OData V4 model, which is not compatible with the methods SAP UI5 custom Applications. Could you please suggest an alternative API that supports the OData V2 model?

entry.title: Re: What's New in SAP BTP – Q1 2025
entry.content: How do I configure WZ with “My Requests” and “My Processes” tiles? I cannot find this mentioned in Documentation or What's New for SAP Build Process Automation.

entry.title: Re: How to dynamically set the basic authentication for t...
entry.content: Either the <Parameter> for Username/Password or the mapIdentifier

entry.title: Re: When to Update Node.js Based on the CAP Node.js Version?
entry.content:
CAP itself supports all LTS versions of Node which are not yet EOL. This means with CAP v9 we drop support for Node 18 and soon also add support for Node 24 once it reaches Active LTS.

Node itself states (https://nodejs.org/en/about/previous-releases) that Production applications should only use Active LTS or Maintenance LTS releases.

I personally would use the Active LTS to benefit from the newest features of Node.js.

entry.title: Re: Change the inspection stock of material XXXXXXX in QM...
entry.content:
Hello　DominikTylczyn

Thank you for yor message.Actually, Inspection lot 5 has already been activated. Even so, the fact that the relevant error is occurring means that it might not be possible to execute it with movement types 703 and 704 in MIGO.I thought it could be handled just by configuring the settings.

Best regards,

Shimpei

entry.title: Archive Link Barcode deactivation
entry.content: Hello! What would be the steps for deactivating Archive Link Barcode and what would be the impact of the deactivation? Thank you!

entry.title: SAP Backbone connectivity
entry.content:
when we configure the backbone connectivity, what all data will be transferred to SAP. we need the data classification in detail. Also how we can make sure that data transfer will be secure. what all protocol will be used. as our system will be connected to SAP, how SAP make sure that there is no security breach.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Backbone connectivity
entry.content:
Dear customer,

The support backbone is the infrastructure that we use to provide you with technical support. Your systems connect to the support backbone to exchange information, such as support incident data, maintenance planner data, and SAP Early Watch Alert data.

For your question how to make sure that data transfer will be secure and how SAP make sure that there is no security breach:

I would recommend refer to below documents according to your SP level for details:

SAP Support Backbone Update Checklists | SAP Help Portal

  • The HTTPS protocol is now used instead of RFC. Most functions in SAP Solution Manager use either BSP or Web Dynpro technologies, which are both based on the HTTP or HTTPS protocols. The infrastructure required to handle HTTP and HTTPS requests using work processes in the SAP system is provided by the Internet Communication Framework (ICF). The ICF also handles Internet communication between systems that use the standard protocols HTTP, HTTPS, and SMTP. To secure communication with a Web browser, you do not require any additional SAP program libraries. The only condition is that your system platform is able to access the Internet, meaning that you have the greatest amount of flexibility when responding to various communication requirements.  
  • A technical communication user handles the data transfer instead of generic users. Technical communication users allow machine-to-machine communication and data exchange. Only super administrators and user administrators have access to the Technical Users app, where they can create, activate, and delete technical communication users.
  • There is no generic inbound interface.
  • Applications send data asynchronously unless the data is sent manually. 

Best regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: INSERT FROM SELECT - The expression that contains "BU...
entry.content:
It's possible to use the SQL function COALESCE to convert NULL into a value, and the warning doesn't show up anymore, e.g.

INSERT ztable FROM ( SELECT coalesce( bkpf~waers , ' ' ), ... FROM zcview ).

But is it good to use COALESCE for just a warning...

entry.title: Re: Hello, I have a dump in transaction MFBF
entry.content: Thanks for the answer, finaly we create an enhancement to add the form missing FORM chmvs_600.

entry.title: Re: Personalize_doc_error found when PPF action is triggered
entry.content:
Hi,

Can you please specify more details around condition records which you are talking about.
In my case we have latest version and Notes are already included. But still getting same error.

Regards,
Chinmay Joshi.

entry.title: Re: SAP South California Community is LIVE!!!
entry.content:
Congratulations @VijayetaSharma on this new regional group! Wishing you the best of success with it!
FYI - @StephanieMarley

entry.title: Re: 关于 SAP 公有云（S/4HANA Cloud）的销售数据锁定
entry.content:
About Sales Data Locking in SAP Public Cloud (S/4HANA Cloud) Here's the English translation:

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition, how can you systematically control the creation and modification of sales documents (such as VA01/VA02/VF01, and so on) during a monthly sales summary (for example, from 1 to 3 days a month)? (If there are still users creating or modifying sales data (such as orders, invoices) during the rollup period (such as the 1st to 3rd of the following month), this can lead to inaccurate aggregation results.)You want the system to lock the creation and modification of sales data automatically during aggregation to avoid human interference. The lock time (such as 1~3) for accounting closing sales data and the lock time for accounting documents (e.g. after 5 days) need to be controlled separately by the finance department within 5 business days of the following month and cannot affect normal financial postings.

What function do you need to use in the standard system to achieve this?

entry.title: VK11 automatic calculation of an alternative unit of measure
entry.content: Hi colleagues, in transaction vk11 user can create separately manually sales price for item per piece and per package C0*, for all alternative units of measurement that are entered for this item in master data. But it is necessary to make an automatic calculation of the price per alternative unit of measure when the price per piece is saved. This should happen exactly in the process of price creation. I can't find a standard SAP solution. Perhaps this should be done via a formula (TA VOFM) and add this formula to the access sequence. But maybe there are other options that I would like to ask you about. Thank you in advance

entry.title: Re: Story reporting - Last Trans Seq
entry.content: Hi Mirjam, There is no similar functionality ('Last Trans Seq.') in Stories. It is quite hard to show only the latest transactions, there are no settings to do it easily. Can you mayve set some filters on Event start and end date? This might help you to exclude some older changes.

entry.title: Re: Story Reports for LMS - Login Details
entry.content: If I'm not mistaken, it's unavailable in LMS source for Stories
